flashcards.definition: The total enthalpy change is the same regardless of the pathway (if same initial and final states).
ΔH°f: the enthalpy change when 1 mole of a compound forms from its elements in standard states.
Add, reverse, or multiply given reactions to match the target reaction; adjust ΔH accordingly.
A visual showing reactant and product energy levels and ΔH for each step.
Calculate ΔH for reactions that are difficult to measure directly.
